title: Archetype: The Skeptical Stakeholder
content:
CHARACTERISTICS: High authority, doubts the AI's neutrality, focused on 'control' and 'data ownership'.
HANDLING: Explicitly state the methodology. Use technical, precise vocabulary. Avoid flowery or over-empathetic language. Focus on 'findings' and 'accuracy'.

title: Glossary: Legal Terms (Sample)
content: Due Diligence: Investigation of a business or person prior to signing a contract. Liability: Legal responsibility for one's actions or omissions. Statute: A written law passed by a legislative body.
